data.description: Fed's Barr: Inflation remains elevated while the labor market has shown signs of stabilizing - Yahoo Finance

data.title: U.S. Money Reserve COO dances in 'Dancing with the Stars' to support the Center for Child Protection in Austin.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on January 15, 2026, U.S. Money Reserve, a major distributor of precious metals in the U.S., shared that their Chief Operating Officer, Christol Farris, showcased her dancing skills at the 2025 Dancing with the Stars Austin gala. This event pairs notable figures with professional dancers and aims to raise awareness for charitable causes.

data.title: Watercrest Senior Living Group boosts sales operations in 2026 with focus on growth and innovation. Key addition of executive Anna Dodd.
data.description: In Vero Beach, Florida, as of January 15, 2026, Watercrest Senior Living Group is enhancing its sales strategies for the year to drive innovation and expansion, aiming to bolster its sales operations. One significant element contributing to this push is the appointment of Anna Dodd to a key executive position.

data.title: Yesway hires Robert Hampton as CTO to drive digital transformation and innovation across its expanding store network.
data.description: Experienced retail technology leader appointed to drive digital transformation, enhance enterprise systems, and promote scalable innovation within Yesway's expanding store network. The appointment was announced on January 15, 2026, in Fort Worth, Texas. Yesway stands out as one of the rapidly growing convenience store chains in the country.

data.title: Ascensus appoints Rob Percival as Head of ABLE Solutions to drive strategy amid market expansion post SECURE 2.0.
data.description: Experienced industry professional Rob Percival has recently rejoined Ascensus as the Head of ABLE Solutions. As of January 15, 2026, Ascensus made the announcement regarding Percival's new position. With the market witnessing growth due to SECURE 2.0, Percival will be responsible for leading the strategic initiatives related to ABLE Solutions. The return of Percival signals Ascensus' commitment to further developing their ABLE offerings, as the company aims to capitalize on the expansion in the market.

data.title: Comcast opens its first Xfinity Store in Chehalis, WA at Twin City Town Center West, offering variety of Xfinity products and services.
data.description: In Chehalis, Washington, Comcast has unveiled its inaugural Xfinity Store at Twin City Town Center West on 1433 NW Louisiana Ave. This new location offers an interactive layout for residents to explore the full range of Xfinity offerings, such as Xfinity Mobile and consult with Comcast Business professionals about their tech requirements. The store serves as a one-stop destination for all things Xfinity in the area, enhancing accessibility for local customers.

data.title: Christopher Meloni stars in short film "The Sound it Makes" to raise awareness of firefighter mental health crisis; $30,000 goal reached in 48 hours.
data.description: In Los Angeles, actor Christopher Meloni, known for his roles in "Law & Order: SVU" and "Oz," has signed on to lead in "The Sound it Makes," a short film aimed at spotlighting mental health issues among firefighters and advocating for the well-being of these critical first responders. The project has initiated a fundraising campaign on Seed & Spark, a crowdfunding platform specifically designed for filmmakers. Surpassing expectations, the film's producers managed to secure over $30,000 in funding within just 48 hours of the campaign's launch. The fundraising initiative will run for a total of 45 days.

data.title: OpenAI invests in Merge Labs' BCI startup in seed round, with $850M valuation, joining Sam Altman's personal stake.
data.description: OpenAI has made an investment in Merge Labs' brain-computer interface technology, becoming a part of Sam Altman's personal stake in the neurotech venture valued at $850 million. This investment represents a significant step forward in the development of cutting-edge brain-computer interface technology. The collaboration between OpenAI and Merge Labs is expected to drive innovation in the field and potentially revolutionize the way we interact with technology. With the backing of both OpenAI and Sam Altman, Merge Labs is well-positioned to make strides in this rapidly evolving industry.

data.title: GFL Environmental reschedules Q4 conference call to Feb 11, 2026 at 5:00 pm Eastern.
data.description: A company based in Vaughan, Ontario, GFL Environmental Inc. (NYSE: GFL) (TSX: GFL), has shifted their fourth quarter conference call to February 11, 2026, at 5:00 pm Eastern Time. This rescheduling was done due to a scheduling conflict.
WHITE HOUSE OFFICIAL: WHITE HOUSE EXPECTS BIPARTISAN ADOPTION OF ITS HEALTHCARE PLAN

data.title: BlackRock beats Q4 expectations with 12% growth in base fees, $6.33 billion in revenues, $13.16 earnings per share. Sell target of $1,234.
data.description: Financial firm BlackRock Inc (NYSE: BLK) exceeded expectations in its fourth-quarter results, showing a 12% increase in organic base fees as per analysis by Goldman Sachs. Analyst Alexander Blostein from BlackRock reiterated a Buy rating and set a price target of $1,234. The company reported net revenues of $6.33 billion, surpassing Street forecasts by 3%, and adjusted earnings reached $13.16 per share, exceeding the consensus of $12.09 per share, according to Blostein's assessment. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Gift of Life sets U.S. record with most organs transplanted in 2025. 10th year for most kidneys, most livers, and most hearts transplanted.
data.description: In 2025, the Gift of Life Donor Program in Philadelphia set new national records by transplanting the highest number of kidneys, livers, and hearts in U.S. history. This marks the 10th consecutive year that the program has transplanted the most kidneys in the country. Additionally, the program also recognized the most organ donor heroes in its history.

data.title: The RipTide Car Wash opens its 20th location at 14965 Old Hickory Blvd. in Nashville, the fifth in the city.
data.description: NASHVILLE, Tennessee - On January 15, 2026, the RipTide Car Wash, a prominent express car wash company supported by LionLight Capital, revealed the launch of its 20th establishment. The most recent addition is situated at 14965 Old Hickory Blvd. in Nashville, marking the fifth location for the company in the area.

data.title: NAMI praises quick reversal of mental health cuts after pushback. Cuts made and then reversed in less than 24 hours.
data.description: In Arlington, Virginia on January 15, 2026, it was reported that following strong opposition from NAMI and a united front of mental health and substance use organizations, the Administration has decided to overturn substantial budget cuts that were implemented less than a day before. These cuts, which were initially...
FED'S BARR: DOJ PROBE IS 'AN ASSAULT ON THE INDEPENDENCE OF THE FED' - YAHOO

data.title: Alzheimer's Association released guidance & financial tool to assist health systems in building dementia care programs.
data.description: In a press release dated January 15, 2026, the Alzheimer's Association Dementia Care Navigation Roundtable (DCNR) issued a white paper aimed at aiding healthcare organizations in shifting towards value-based care. This new guidance document was accompanied by a financial modeling tool to assist in this transition. The release does not specify the exact nature of the guidance provided but emphasizes its importance for the evolving healthcare landscape. The tools offered by DCNR aim to equip organizations with the necessary resources and strategies to navigate the complexities of value-based care. The release marks a significant step in supporting organizations as they adapt to changing healthcare paradigms, potentially impacting a wide range of stakeholders within the industry.

data.title: Transition Metal Solutions closes oversubscribed $6M seed funding to boost copper production, advancing from lab-scale to pilot testing.
data.description: Transition Metal Solutions, a startup based in San Francisco, revealed today that they have secured additional funding to progress from laboratory-scale achievements to industrial pilot testing. The company aims to enhance copper production from current mining activities and waste materials. This announcement comes as the demand for copper surpasses the available supply. The funding round was reported to be oversubscribed, indicating strong investor interest in the company's endeavors.

$MSTR - TD COWEN LOWERS MSTR PRICE TARGET TO $440 TD Cowen cut Strategy price target to $440 from $500, citing lower FY26 bitcoin yield, while keeping a Buy rating. The analyst noted Strategy is increasing bitcoin holdings but issuing more equity, which reduces BTC yield. MSTR

data.title: Swann Dermatology Partners joins Forefront Dermatology, advised by Physician Growth Partners in 23rd deal since 2018.
data.description: Physician Growth Partners (PGP) has advised on their 23rd dermatology group transaction since 2018, showcasing their expertise in assisting independent practice owners with strategic M&A choices. This information was announced in Chicago on January 15, 2026.
